text:
……ありがとう。
これが、こっちの世界における
果物とハーブなんだね。

見た目は地球のものと似てるわね。
さ、さあ……食べるわよ、フル！

……ほんのわずかに違う、けど
食べられないってわけじゃない。
むしろ、想像よりおいしい。

ホントだ……っていうか
ほぼ地球の果物と、同じ味じゃない！
これなら、チョコの材料にできそう！

……ほぼ同じなら
地球の果物を使えばいいと思う。

台無しだー！
フルが今、２００％台無しにしたー

Thank you. So these are the sorts of fruits and
herbs you have in your world...

They look similar enough to Earth ones. So,
uh, okay... Time to eat, Phul!

It's all ever-so-slightly different, but still
entirely edible. Given that I was bracing for
the worst, this stuff isn't half bad.

Wow, you're right... Hell, this is pretty much
just like the fruit on Earth! I can totally
make chocolate with this!

Well, given how similar they are, I think we
should just use Earth fruits after all.

THEN WHAT WAS ALL THIS FOR!? You just
200% ruined this whole experiment, Phul!
